# uapi_whoami (Data Source)

Identity and scopes of the bearer token the provider is configured with.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_whoami" "current" {}

output "token_scopes" {
  value = data.uapi_whoami.current.scopes
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `allowed_cidrs` (List of String) Source CIDRs the token is restricted to.
- `expires_at` (Number) Unix epoch seconds when the token expires, if set.
- `last_used_at` (Number) Unix epoch seconds of the token's previous use, if any.
- `last_used_ip` (String) Source IP of the token's previous use, if any.
- `scopes` (List of String) Scopes granted to the token.
- `source_ip` (String) Source IP of this request as seen by the router.
- `token_id` (String) Name of the calling token.
